hero.title: Messaging built for privacy, by design
hero.subtitle: Secure messages between you and the people you trust. No accounts, no servers storing your data.
meta.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging with no accounts, no central servers, and post-quantum protection. Open source and peer-to-peer.
download.title: Download Bus
download.subtitle: The desktop app for Kamune. Available for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
download.linuxArmComingSoon: Linux ARM support is coming soon
features.title: Security features that protect you today and tomorrow
features.subtitle: Every layer of Kamune is designed to keep your conversations private and safe.
features.postQuantum.title: Post-Quantum Security
features.postQuantum.desc: Future-proof encryption that protects your messages even against quantum computers.
features.e2e.title: End-to-End Encrypted
features.e2e.desc: Only you and the person you're talking to can read your messages. No one in between.
features.p2p.title: Peer-to-Peer
features.p2p.desc: Messages go directly between devices. No central server stores your conversations or who you talk to.
features.transport.title: Multi-Transport
features.transport.desc: Works over multiple network types — TCP, UDP, WebSocket, or TLS. Pick what works for your setup.
features.forward.title: Forward Secrecy
features.forward.desc: Each conversation uses its own unique keys. Even if one key is compromised, past and future messages stay safe.
features.open.title: Open Source
features.open.desc: Fully open source. Anyone can verify the code does what it claims.
cipher.title: Built on proven cryptography
cipher.subtitle: A hybrid cipher suite combining classical and post-quantum algorithms for defense in depth.
cipher.keyExchangeDesc: Creates shared secret resistant to quantum attacks
cipher.kdfDesc: Turns shared secret into unique session keys
cipher.encryptionDesc: Encrypts every message with integrity protection
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to establish a secure, authenticated channel between two peers.
howItWorks.step1.title: Exchange
howItWorks.step1.desc: HPKE establishes an encrypted tunnel using hybrid ML-KEM-768-X25519 key agreement.
howItWorks.step2.title: Handshake
howItWorks.step2.desc: Post-quantum ML-KEM-768 key exchange with mutual challenge-response verification.
howItWorks.step3.title: Communication
howItWorks.step3.desc: Signed, encrypted, and sequenced message frames with replay protection and traffic analysis resistance.
modules.title: Everything you need, from library to app
modules.subtitle: A complete toolkit for secure communication, from library to desktop app.
modules.core.title: Core Library
modules.core.desc: The heart of Kamune — handles encryption, connections, and message storage.
modules.bus.title: Bus (GUI)
modules.bus.desc: Desktop app for chatting with full security. Manage sessions, verify peers, and view encrypted history.
modules.relay.title: Relay Server
modules.relay.desc: Helps devices connect when they can't reach each other directly. Never sees who's talking or what they say.
modules.tui.title: TUI Client
modules.tui.desc: Chat from your terminal. Connect directly or through a relay, with emoji verification and chat history.
modules.daemon.title: Daemon
modules.daemon.desc: Integrate Kamune into other apps — Tauri, Electron, editor plugins, or your own scripts.
relay.title: A relay that sees nothing
relay.subtitle: Helps devices connect when they can't reach each other directly. It never reads your messages or stores your data.
relay.blindDesc: Never sees public keys, identities, or message content.
relay.statelessDesc: No persistent storage, no queues, no offline messages.
relay.zeroMetadataDesc: No social graph, no presence tracking, no persistent identifiers.
relay.transportAgnosticDesc: Same protocol over WebSocket, raw TCP, or TLS.
relay.broker.title: UDP Hole Punching
relay.broker.desc: Optional broker that helps peers discover addresses and punch through NAT — no relay needed for the data path.
relay.transportTable.title: Transport Comparison
security.title: Defense in depth
security.subtitle: Multiple independent security layers protect your communications.
security.confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
security.confidentiality.desc: Every message is encrypted with session-specific keys using ChaCha20-Poly1305X.
security.integrity.title: Integrity
security.integrity.desc: Protected by three layers: AEAD authentication tag, digital signatures, and sequence numbers.
security.auth.title: Authentication
security.auth.desc: Both parties authenticate each other using Ed25519 digital signatures.
security.forward.title: Forward Secrecy
security.forward.desc: New ML-KEM keys per session ensure past conversations stay private.
security.postQuantum.title: Post-Quantum
security.postQuantum.desc: ML-KEM-768 key exchange resists quantum computer attacks.
security.replay.title: Replay Protection
security.replay.desc: Sequence numbers detect and reject duplicate messages.
security.traffic.title: Traffic Analysis Resistance
security.traffic.desc: Random padding makes encrypted traffic harder to analyze.
quickStart.title: Get started in minutes
quickStart.subtitle: Install and run Kamune in your project.
quickStart.coreDesc: Add Kamune to your Go project
